title: catalog-meta
description: Machine-readable metadata written by okhp3-skill-cataloger alongside README.md on every successful run.

last_indexed.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last successful catalog run. Example: 2026-06-23T18:10:00Z

skill_count.description: Total number of skills found and indexed in this run.

mode.description: Catalog mode used: project (flat layout) or library (categorized layout).

indexed_by.description: Name and version of the cataloger script. Example: okhp3-skill-cataloger v1.1.0
